customInstructions: This mock test strictly follows the HP Patwari Exam Pattern.
Total Questions: 120, Total Marks: 120, Total Time: 120 Minutes.
Every incorrect answer will deduct 0.25 Marks (Negative Marking).
Questions are available in both English and Hindi.
